TextRun.Text: 5. be raised in a family of ... （
12. pour one's heart and soul into...

RichText.Text: 1. a series of 2. develop a passion for..... 3. deep-rooted affection for... be deeply rooted in... 4. artistic vision (art n. artistic adj.) 5. be raised in a family of ... （raise v. 养育） 6. be ignited by ...... 7. stumble upon a documentary 8. capture the emotional depth of the performances 9. discover a hidden gem (hide-hid-hidden-hiding) 10. be struck by the warmth of its people 11. a unique way of blending tradition with modernity 12. pour one's heart and soul into... 13. gain recognition for... in recognition of (recognize v. ) 14. capture the essence of

TextRun.Text: 11. 一种将传统与现代相融合的

RichText.Text: 1. 一系列 2. 培养对……的热爱 3. 对……根深蒂固的感情/喜爱 深深扎根于/根植于…… 4. 艺术的视野 5. 在一个……的家庭中长大 6. 被……点燃 7. 偶然发现一部纪录片 8. 捕获/捕捉表演的情感深度 9. 发现一颗隐藏的瑰宝 10. 被当地人的热情所打动 11. 一种将传统与现代相融合的 独特方式 12. 全身心投入…… 13. 因……获得认可 作为对……的认可/赞扬 14. 捕捉……的精髓/本质
